Penpot plugins API
    Preparing search index...
    • TokenFontWeights

    Interface TokenFontWeights

    Represents a token of type FontWeights. This interface extends TokenBase and specifies the data type of the value.

    interface TokenFontWeights {
        id: string;
        name: string;
        description: string;
        duplicate(): Token;
        remove(): void;
        resolvedValueString: string | undefined;
        applyToShapes(
            shapes: Shape[],
            properties: TokenProperty[] | undefined,
        ): void;
        applyToSelected(properties: TokenProperty[] | undefined): void;
        type: "fontWeights";
        value: string;
        resolvedValue: string | undefined;
    }

    Hierarchy (View Summary)

    • TokenBase
      • TokenFontWeights
    • Defined in index.d.ts:4617
    Index

    Properties

    id name description resolvedValueString type value resolvedValue

    Methods

    duplicate remove applyToShapes applyToSelected

    Properties

    Readonlyid

    id: string

    The unique identifier for this token, used only internally inside Penpot. This one is not exported or synced with external Design Token sources.

    Inherited from TokenBase.id

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4328

    name

    name: string

    The name of the token. It may include a group path separated by ..

    Inherited from TokenBase.name

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4333

    description

    description: string

    An optional description text.

    Inherited from TokenBase.description

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4338

    ReadonlyresolvedValueString

    resolvedValueString: string | undefined

    The value calculated by finding all tokens with the same name in active sets and resolving the references.

    It's converted to string, regardless of the data type of the value depending on the token type. It can be undefined if no value has been found in active sets.

    Inherited from TokenBase.resolvedValueString

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4361

    Readonlytype

    type: "fontWeights"

    The type of the token.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4621

    value

    value: string

    The value as defined in the token itself. It's a weight string or a reference.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4627

    ReadonlyresolvedValue

    resolvedValue: string | undefined

    The value calculated by finding all tokens with the same name in active sets and resolving the references.

    It's a weight string ("bold", "strong", etc.), or undefined if no value has been found in active sets.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4636

    Methods

    duplicate

    • duplicate(): Token

      Adds to the set that contains this Token a new one equal to this one but with a new id.

      Returns Token

      Inherited from TokenBase.duplicate

      • Defined in index.d.ts:4344

    remove

    • remove(): void

      Removes this token from the catalog.

      It will NOT be unapplied from any shape, since there may be other tokens with the same name.

      Returns void

      Inherited from TokenBase.remove

      • Defined in index.d.ts:4352

    applyToShapes

    • applyToShapes(shapes: Shape[], properties: TokenProperty[] | undefined): void

      Applies this token to one or more properties of the given shapes.

      Parameters

      • shapes: Shape[]

        is an array of shapes to apply it.

      • properties: TokenProperty[] | undefined

        an optional list of property names. If omitted, the default properties will be applied.

        NOTE that the tokens application is by name and not by id. If there exist several tokens with the same name in different sets, the actual token applied and the value set to the attributes will depend on which sets are active (and will change if different sets or themes are activated later).

      Returns void

      Inherited from TokenBase.applyToShapes

      • Defined in index.d.ts:4374

    applyToSelected

    • applyToSelected(properties: TokenProperty[] | undefined): void

      Applies this token to the currently selected shapes.

      Parameters and warnings are the same as above.

      Parameters

      • properties: TokenProperty[] | undefined

      Returns void

      Inherited from TokenBase.applyToSelected

      • Defined in index.d.ts:4381
